text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After coming to observe a dance lesson, I find
myself pulled into some pair dance training with
Sirius Symboli!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Huh... So you got a little less crap at this. You still
turn like a baby deer though.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite how harsh her critique sounds, I have no
good counterargument to make. On second
thought, maybe her comment was actually... kind,
in a way? Suddenly...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Might I cut in?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I wish to have a dance with you. Just one. What
do you say?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: ...Clearly you see we're busy. What're you up to?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
No ulterior motives here. I simply felt like
dancing.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Oh, please! Who are you kidding? Or I guess the
Emperor's got nothing better to do, then.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Hey, you!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Pick me as your partner. I'll lead.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Now, shall we begin? My hand is yours to take.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Ah! Let's go with this track! This song's so one person can alternate between two partners! Aaand play!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The song starts. Both Umamusume make such
magnificent leads that the students watching
squeal in delight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sirius Symboli leads quite assertively, but I never
feel like I'm being left behind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Drawn into her rhythm, it's as though I'm dancing
with a swirling pillar of flames.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Your dance partner is here. Quit looking around. Lift your face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf, on the other hand, aligns her
momentum with mine and moves with graceful
elegance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel the want to be carried away into her stream
of serenity—I want to give in to her riverlike
current.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Do you grow anxious from the looks of our
surrounding audience? Ignore them. In this
moment, I am your partner. Your attention should
be fixed on me.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
So you're tepid on the dancefloor, too? Gimme a
break.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Try listening more closely to the music.
Expression doesn't come from ferocity alone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sparks start to fly between my two partners, even
as their eyes remain fixed on me. The air between
them may be hostile, but throughout the rest of
the room...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: They're amazing. I want to dance like that too!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text: I'm next! Dance with me next! Pleeease!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I find myself immersed in the feverish excitement
of the room.

text_block_list.name: Onlookers
text_block_list.text: That was heavenly!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
I think I'm in love... I want to dance like they did.
Do you think I can learn how if I keep taking
lessons?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Same! Same! It was just so cool how she led the trainer with all those flowing movements.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...Oh. Yes, that was it all along.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: (A heat born of friction...)

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
(Of course. Though we may clash, it doesn't lead
us to a standstill. The two of us are always striving
to move forward.)

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
(The heat we generate draws others in, such that
it may push us all beyond that apex.)

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
(Though our paths may never cross, and though
our destinations are different, with this passion...)

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
(Perhaps we can guide the great many to new
possibilities.)

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
We were both incredible? ...It still hasn't sunk in,
huh? Get over here, and I'll show you what I can
do one more time.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Heh. Indeed. I would have you comprehend
thoroughly this heat that guides the many.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With sparks between them lighting up the room,
Symboli Rudolf and Sirius Symboli stand before
me. Behind, a crowd of envious-looking
Umamusume watch on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And then I come to realize, I'm surrounded on all
sides.
